title: Primer Grip 360 Universal Tile Primer & Flooring Bonding Agent for Porous & Non-Porous Surfaces Fast Drying Ready-to-Use 1kg
features: 🔧 ULTIMATE BONDING PROMER: Hybrid primer with gritty texture enhances mechanical adhesion for tiles, levelling compounds, and floor screeds.
🧱 POROUS & NON-POROUS SURFACES: Bonds to plaster, concrete, epoxy DPM, timber, vinyl, plasterboard, tile backer boards & more.
⚡ FAST DRYING FORMULA: Rapid drying time of 15-30 minutes; ideal for fast-track tiling and levelling applications.
🖌️ EASY APPLICATION: Ready-to-use green-tinted formula for simple roller or brush application; one-coat coverage with no mixing required.
🔒 IMPROVES TILE ADHESION: Boosts grip and reduces delamination risk, even on smooth, sealed or challenging surfaces.

productOverview.value: Concrete, Gypsum, Metal, Plasterboard, Tiles, Timber, Vinyl

breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Hardware > Adhesives & Sealers > Sealers
